# peperr

# Parallelised Estimation of Prediction Error

## Maintainer F. Bertrand

<https://doi.org/10.32614/CRAN.package.peperr>

`peperr` is designed for prediction error estimation through resampling
techniques, possibly accelerated by parallel execution on a compute
cluster. Newly developed model fitting routines can be easily
incorporated. Methods used in the package are detailed in Porzelius Ch.,
Binder H. and Schumacher M. (2009)
[10.1093/bioinformatics/btp062](https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btp062)
and were used, for instance, in Porzelius Ch., Schumacher M.and Binder
H. (2011)
[10.1007/s00180-011-0236-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00180-011-0236-6).

## Installation

You can install the released version of peperr from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org) with:

``` r
install.packages("peperr")
```

And the development version from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("fbertran/peperr")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`PLL(`*`<CoxBoost>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/PLL.CoxBoost.md)
  : Predictive partial log-likelihood for a CoxBoost model fit
- [`PLL()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/PLL.md) :
  Generic function for extracting the predictive partial log-likelihood
- [`PLL(`*`<coxph>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/PLL.coxph.md)
  : Predictive partial log-likelihood for Cox poportional hazards model
- [`PLL(`*`<penfit>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/PLL.penfit.md)
  : Predictive partial log-likelihood for penalized Cox models
- [`fit.SGL.cox()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/SGL-backend.md)
  [`complexity.cvSGL.cox()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/SGL-backend.md)
  [`predictProb(`*`<SGL_cox>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/SGL-backend.md)
  [`PLL(`*`<SGL_cox>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/SGL-backend.md)
  : Sparse-group-lasso Cox backend
- [`aggregation.brier()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/aggregation.brier.md)
  : Determine the Brier score for a fitted model
- [`aggregation.misclass()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/aggregation.misclass.md)
  : Determine the missclassification rate for a fitted model
- [`aggregation.pmpec()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/aggregation.pmpec.md)
  : Determine the prediction error curve for a fitted model
- [`complexity.cv.penalized()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/complexity.LASSO.md)
  [`complexity.LASSO()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/complexity.LASSO.md)
  [`complexity.fusedLASSO()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/complexity.LASSO.md)
  : Complexity selection helpers for penalized backends
- [`complexity.ipec.CoxBoost()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/complexity.ipec.CoxBoost.md)
  [`complexity.ripec.CoxBoost()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/complexity.ipec.CoxBoost.md)
  : Interface function for CoxBoost complexity selection via integrated
  prediction error curves
- [`complexity.mincv.CoxBoost()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/complexity.mincv.CoxBoost.md)
  : Interface for CoxBoost selection of the optimal number of boosting
  steps via cross-validation
- [`extract.fun()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/extract.fun.md)
  : Extract functions, libraries and global variables to be loaded onto
  a compute cluster
- [`fit.CoxBoost()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/fit.CoxBoost.md)
  : Interface function for fitting a CoxBoost model
- [`fit.penalized()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/fit.LASSO.md)
  [`fit.LASSO()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/fit.LASSO.md)
  [`fit.fusedLASSO()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/fit.LASSO.md)
  : Penalized backend fitting wrappers
- [`fit.coxph()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/fit.coxph.md)
  : Interface function for fitting a Cox proportional hazards model
- [`fit.glmnet()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/glmnet-backend.md)
  [`complexity.cv.glmnet()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/glmnet-backend.md)
  [`predictProb(`*`<coxnet>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/glmnet-backend.md)
  [`PLL(`*`<coxnet>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/glmnet-backend.md)
  : glmnet Cox backend
- [`fit.grpsurv()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/grpreg-backend.md)
  [`complexity.cv.grpsurv()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/grpreg-backend.md)
  [`predictProb(`*`<grpsurv>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/grpreg-backend.md)
  [`PLL(`*`<grpsurv>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/grpreg-backend.md)
  : grpreg grouped Cox backend
- [`ipec()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/ipec.md) :
  Integrated prediction error curve
- [`fit.mboost.coxph()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/mboost-backend.md)
  [`complexity.cvrisk.mboost()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/mboost-backend.md)
  [`predictProb(`*`<mboost_coxph>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/mboost-backend.md)
  [`PLL(`*`<mboost_coxph>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/mboost-backend.md)
  : mboost Cox backend
- [`fit.ncvsurv()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/ncvreg-backend.md)
  [`complexity.cv.ncvsurv()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/ncvreg-backend.md)
  [`predictProb(`*`<ncvsurv>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/ncvreg-backend.md)
  [`PLL(`*`<ncvsurv>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/ncvreg-backend.md)
  : ncvreg survival backend
- [`peperr()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/peperr.md) :
  Parallelised Estimation of Prediction Error
- [`perr()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/perr.md) :
  Prediction error estimates
- [`plot(`*`<peperr>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/plot.peperr.md)
  : Plot method for peperr object
- [`pmpec()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/pmpec.md) :
  Calculate prediction error curves
- [`predictProb(`*`<CoxBoost>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/predictProb.CoxBoost.md)
  : Extract predicted survival probabilities from a CoxBoost fit
- [`predictProb()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/predictProb.md)
  : Generic function for extracting predicted survival probabilities
- [`predictProb(`*`<coxph>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/predictProb.coxph.md)
  : Extract predicted survival probabilities from a coxph object
- [`predictProb(`*`<penfit>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/predictProb.penfit.md)
  : Predicted survival probabilities for penalized Cox models
- [`predictProb(`*`<survfit>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/predictProb.survfit.md)
  : Extract predicted survival probabilities from a survfit object
- [`fit.rfsrc()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/randomForestSRC-backend.md)
  [`complexity.oob.rfsrc()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/randomForestSRC-backend.md)
  [`predictProb(`*`<rfsrc>`*`)`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/randomForestSRC-backend.md)
  : randomForestSRC survival backend
- [`resample.indices()`](https://fbertran.github.io/peperr/reference/resample.indices.md)
  : Generation of indices for resampling Procedure
